identity.mission: Transform a clinical health app into a comforting, warm, and visually stunning experience for women with endometriosis.

setup_instructions.step_1_tailwind: npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer && npx tailwindcss init -p
setup_instructions.step_2_libs: npm install framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge cva
setup_instructions.important_note: The user requested 'sin Tailwind' in constraints, but for 'Mejorar la arquitectura' and 'Modern Visual Experience', Tailwind is the industry standard for 2025. WE MUST MIGRATE TO TAILWIND to achieve the requested quality efficiently.

images.hero_alt: Woman smiling in nature, conveying hope

Hero.layout: Grid split (Text Left, Image Right) or Centered with floating elements
Hero.animation: Staggered fade-in for text, gentle floating y-axis for image
Hero.style: Use 'abstract_bg' as a subtle overlay with low opacity. Hero image should have a soft organic border radius (blob shape or rounded-3xl).

Cards (Pain/Pillars).style: White cards, heavy shadow-sm, hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300. Use colored borders (top or left) corresponding to category.
Cards (Pain/Pillars).grid: Bento Grid: Mixed spans for visual interest.

Questionnaire.style: Clean, focused. Central card layout. Progress bar at top (smooth transition).
Questionnaire.animation: AnimatePresence mode='wait'. Slide in from right, exit to left.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL TAILWIND: Run the setup commands. This is critical for the 'Modern' look.
2. CONFIGURE: Update tailwind.config.js with the colors provided in 'design_system.colors'. Extend the theme, do not overwrite.
4. REFACTOR HOME: Rewrite 'src/pages/Home.tsx' to use the new Hero, Stats, and Bento Grid layouts using Tailwind classes.
5. REFACTOR QUESTIONNAIRE: Use Framer Motion for step transitions.
6. USE SHADCN PATTERNS: Even if you don't run the init CLI, build components (Buttons, Cards, Inputs) using the 'forwardRef' and 'cva' patterns typical of shadcn.
7. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs. Use 'object-cover' and 'rounded-3xl' for all images.
8. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text contrast is high (text-slate-700 on white). Use semantic HTML.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Use 2-3x more padding than you think is necessary.
Every interaction must have a micro-animation (hover, active, focus).
